Welcome to my GitHub profile!

Fell in love with the ***"Gutsy Gibbon"***, and the romance continued through the ***"Hardy Heron"***... After many on and off flings, got into the ***"Quantal Quetzal"*** and moved on to the ***"Raring Ringtail"***...and the bond intensified with the ***"Saucy Salamander"***. Continued on the ***"Trusty Tahr"***, the ***"Utopic Unicorn"***, and the ***"Vivid Vervet"*** for as long as I could... Life happened, but the love brought me back to the ***"Noble Numbat"***, looking out for the ***"Resolute Raccoon"*** update to drop!
